personas.description: Routes patients, manages waiting room queue

journeys.name: Book & Attend Video Consultation
journeys.goal: Schedule and complete a telehealth visit with minimal friction

researchInsights.finding: Elderly patients need 3x larger touch targets and audio guidance
Clinicians reject workflows requiring > 3 clicks to start consultation
Waiting room anxiety reduces with real-time queue position display
After-hours booking (6-9pm) accounts for 40% of appointments
Video consultation satisfaction drops below 720p resolution
Consent form completion rate 3x higher with progressive disclosure

ideas.name: AI-Powered Ticket Classification
ideas.brief: NLP auto-classifies tickets by category, priority, and assignment group on submission.

ideas.name: Predictive SLA Breach Alerting
ideas.brief: ML model predicts SLA breaches 2h before occurrence based on historical patterns.

ideas.name: Chat-Based Ticket Creation
ideas.brief: Conversational interface (Slack/Teams bot) for ticket creation without opening portal.

ideas.name: Auto-Healing Runbooks
ideas.brief: Execute predefined remediation scripts for known issues automatically upon detection.

ideas.name: Customer Satisfaction Pulse
ideas.brief: Micro-survey after ticket closure + sentiment NPS dashboard for ops managers.

ideas.name: Blockchain Audit Trail
ideas.brief: Immutable ticket history using distributed ledger for compliance evidence.
ideas.reason: Over-engineered. Standard audit logging with hash chains is sufficient. Revisit if regulated industry mandates arise.

ideas.name: Multi-Tenant SaaS Model
ideas.brief: Redesign for multi-tenancy to offer ITSM-as-a-service to external clients.
ideas.reason: Strategically interesting but premature. Focus on single-tenant MVP first. Revisit post-v1.0 launch.

ideas.name: Real-Time Collaboration on Tickets
ideas.brief: Google Docs-style live editing and commenting on ticket investigation notes.

ideas.name: Unified Customer Health Score
ideas.brief: Composite score combining product usage, support tickets, billing, and engagement signals.

ideas.name: Voice of Customer Analytics
ideas.brief: NLP analysis of support conversations, reviews, and survey responses for insight extraction.

ideas.name: Partner Revenue Share Automation
ideas.brief: Automated commission calculation and payout based on deal registration rules.

ideas.name: Dark Mode for All Platforms
ideas.brief: System-wide dark theme support across web, mobile, and email templates.

ideas.name: AI Resume Bias Detection
ideas.brief: Automated bias detection in resume screening algorithms with fairness metrics dashboard.

ideas.name: Employee Wellness Gamification
ideas.brief: Points-based wellness program with challenges, leaderboards, and health insurance discounts.

ideas.name: Decentralized Identity for Patients
ideas.brief: Self-sovereign identity (SSI) for patient credential management using verifiable credentials.
ideas.reason: Technology too immature for healthcare. Standards not finalized. Revisit when W3C VC adoption reaches critical mass in health sector.

ideas.name: AR Product Visualization
ideas.brief: Augmented reality product preview using phone camera for marketplace listings.
ideas.reason: Compelling but requires significant R&D investment. Park until marketplace reaches 10K active sellers threshold.

ideas.name: Smart Appointment Scheduling
ideas.brief: AI-optimized scheduling that considers travel time, preparation, clinician specialties, and patient preferences.

ideas.name: Real-Time Fraud Detection Engine
ideas.brief: ML-based transaction scoring with < 50ms latency for payment authorization decisions.

ideas.name: Seller Performance Scorecard
ideas.brief: Composite seller rating based on fulfillment speed, return rate, response time, and review quality.

ideas.name: Cross-Platform Push Notifications
ideas.brief: Unified notification service supporting web push, iOS, Android, email, SMS, and Slack.
